hook: Photos should answer doubts before your bio has to work that hard.
body: Visual clarity communicates confidence, stability, and normal social life faster than copy ever can.

hook: Too many men rely on captions to repair bad photos that already created confusion.
body: Think of your bio as seasoning; the photos should already handle the main proof of who you are.
